title: Jeu D'Esprit Upon A Very Pretty Woman Asking The Author His Opinion Of Beauty.
content:
Madam! you ask what marks for beauty pass:
    Require them rather from your looking-glass!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, John Carr (Sir) delivers a powerful performance in "Jeu D'Esprit Upon A Very Pretty Woman Asking The Author His Opinion Of Beauty."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
